name: Grilled Sesame Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Chicken Breast Halves (with skin removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine brown sugar, garlic, black pepper, and reduced-sodium soy sauce until well mixed.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade, turning to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade and discard it.
4. Grill the chicken over medium-hot coals for 4-5 minutes on each side, basting frequently with the reserved marinade.
5. Serve 4 servings.
